command_or_action: Confirm the target system and hosting path for www.frawo-tech.de.
Confirm the public website content is the intended GbR release content.
Visibly verify apex and www browser behavior for the website release scope.

Confirm SPF, DKIM and DMARC are all intentionally configured for release.
Confirm rollback for DNS, TLS and host-switch is complete and usable.
